case_title: ADRIAN COLLEY ET AL VS. LORI SCANDALIOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-01-2023 CONTINUED TO APR-05-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 69914037) EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS.
